top_signals.title: Australia’s Core Lithium Restarts Mining After Prices Rebound
top_signals.summary: Core Lithium Ltd. has restarted mining at its Finniss project in Australia’s Northern Territory, as a rebound in prices of the battery material prompts some companies to resume mothballed operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The Debate: Is Gen Z right to reject corporate culture?
top_signals.summary: Late, rude and unproductive, Gen Z has gained quite the reputation in the office. But are they right to challenge corporate culture?
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
